street.description: Street or way on which traffic must yield

direction.description: Direction of travel governed by the sign; empty when the source does not state one

yields_to.description: Street or way being entered; empty when the source text does not state it unambiguously

location_detail.description: Lane, island, or position qualifier from the source (e.g. 'from right turn lane', 'at the channelized traffic island')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text
